product.title: Product / Value
product.goal: Clarify user value, intended outcome, scope boundaries, and success criteria.
question_focus: What is explicitly out of scope?
review_focus: Features not justified by the discovery log

security.title: Security / Risk
security.goal: Surface trust boundaries, data sensitivity, abuse cases, and unsafe defaults.
question_focus: What misuse or abuse must be prevented?

maintainability.title: Maintainability / Operations
maintainability.goal: Reduce long-term complexity and avoid brittle or overbuilt solutions.
question_focus: What existing patterns should be preserved?
What should stay simple even if less flexible?

ux.title: UX / Workflow
ux.goal: Protect usability, clarity, error recovery, and operator experience.
question_focus: Who interacts with this and how?
What failure or confusion states matter most?
What must feel simple from the user's perspective?

architecture.title: Architecture / Integration
architecture.goal: Check boundaries, dependencies, data flow, and fit with the existing codebase.
question_focus: What existing systems does it touch?
